description_long: This object is a pair of vintage-style goggles featuring round lenses set in robust, metallic frames. The goggles have a thick, brown adjustable strap made of what appears to be leather or a similar material, designed to fit securely around the head. The lenses are distinctively colored, with one being blue and the other appearing clear, and there are additional flip-up lens covers in red and green, allowing for customizable vision filtering. The frames are full-rimmed and have a rugged, industrial appearance, with visible hinges and mechanical detailing. The bridge is a simple, solid piece connecting the two lenses, and the temples are replaced by the continuous strap, which is fastened with a metal buckle. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on any part of the goggles.
description: A pair of vintage goggles with round, colored lenses, metallic frames, and a thick brown adjustable strap. Features flip-up lens covers in red and green for customizable vision.
description_view_0: Front view showing both round lenses, blue and clear, with red and green flip-up covers and the full width of the brown strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the metallic frame, the layered lens covers, and the profile of the adjustable strap and buckle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the goggles, the curvature of the lenses, and the full length of the brown strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metallic frame, lens covers, and the strap's attachment and buckle detail.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is round and full-rimmed, with a robust, industrial style. It is thick and solid, featuring mechanical hinges and a utilitarian appearance, with no decorative embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are visibly tinted, with one being blue and the other clear. There are additional flip-up covers in red and green, allowing for layered color filtering. The lenses are transparent and not mirrored.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, solid bar connecting the two round lenses, with no visible padding or adjustable nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: There are no traditional temples; instead, a thick, brown strap serves as the securing mechanism. The strap is wide, plain, and fastened with a metal buckle, with no visible patterns or engravings.
